en: Our next nominee is supporting actor Delroy Lindo.
Lindo, who has had an over five-decade career in television, stage, and screen,
received his first Oscar nomination for his performance in Ryan Coogler's Sinners.
Lindo plays blues musician Delta Slim in what Ryan Coogler has dubbed
as the physical embodiment of the blues as it's portrayed within the film.
Although Lindo's collaboration with Ryan Coogler is the one that earned him his first Oscar nomination,
his long collaborations with Spike Lee have been making waves in Hollywood throughout his career,
including his performances in films like Malcolm X, Crooklyn,
and the more recent edition, The Five Bloods, which many felt was going to be his very first acting nomination.
Definitely one of the most pleasant surprise on Oscar's nomination this morning,
many folks are hoping that his long history at the Academy and career of stellar work
could give him an advantage come Oscar night.
To find out if Delroy Lindo takes home the Oscar or for any of your Oscar news,
head on over to rottentomatoes.com and check out our awards tour section
where we break down every beat along Oscar season.
And be sure to download our Oscar ballot where you can break down every win on Oscar night.
